audiences.name: CFO / Finance Leader
audiences.description: Owns financial planning, profitability, and capital efficiency
suggested_questions: What's our Q4 savings forecast?
Which departments are over 10% on budget variance?
How does this quarter's gross margin compare to last year?
What's the projected runway at current burn rate?
Show me revenue by product line, with anomalies flagged.

audiences.name: CEO / Founder
suggested_questions: Give me a one-page board update for this month.
What changed materially this week vs last week?
Which 3 things should I be most worried about right now?
Compare us to plan across all departments.

audiences.name: RevOps Lead
audiences.description: Owns sales process, pipeline health, and forecast accuracy
suggested_questions: Where is the biggest pipeline drop-off this quarter?
Which reps are at risk of missing quota?
Has our sales cycle gotten longer or shorter?
What's the forecast vs commit gap?

audiences.name: Head of People
suggested_questions: Where is voluntary attrition spiking?
What's our average time-to-hire by function?
Which teams scored lowest on the latest engagement survey?
Cost-per-hire trend over the last 6 months.

audiences.name: Customer Success Leader
suggested_questions: Which accounts are at highest churn risk?
What's our NRR trend?
Where are response times slipping?
Top 5 expansion opportunities this quarter.

audiences.name: Engineering Leader
suggested_questions: What's our DORA performance this quarter?
Where are the deploys failing most?
MTTR trend by service.
Which services have the worst incident rate?

audiences.name: Risk / Compliance Officer
suggested_questions: Which transactions look anomalous this week?
Open audit findings older than 30 days.
False-positive rate trend on fraud alerts.
Any new high-severity incidents in last 24h?
